scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w packages/logger -w packages/mock-runner -w packages/validation-compiler -w packages/utils/build-tools --if-present
scripts.build:generator: cd tools/api-service-generator && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:onix: cd tools/beckn-onix && docker build -f Dockerfile.adapter-with-plugins -t automation-beckn-onix:local .
